items.body:
No API design issues found. This is the first release (`1.0.0-beta.1`) of the new `@azure/arm-monitorslis` package targeting API version `2025-03-01-preview`. The public API surface, client naming (`MonitorClient`), and `KnownVersions` enum all look correct.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":38214,"summary":"clean","findings":[]}
```

</details>

## Next Steps to Merge
Only failed checks and required actions are listed below.

- 🔄 **pnpm-lock conflict**: All CI jobs (`Build`, `Analyze`, `UnitTest` on all platforms) are failing with `ERR_PNPM_LOCKFILE_MISSING_DEPENDENCY Broken lockfile: no entry for 'prettier@3.8.2' in pnpm-lock.yaml`. The `pnpm-lock.yaml` is out of sync with the current main branch. Follow the [conflict guide](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/blob/main/documentation/resolve-pnpm-lock-merge-conflict.md) to regenerate the lockfile. Review [ADO logs](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/public/_build/results?buildId=6183848&view=results).
